question: What is the main theme of the book of Zechariah as discussed in the lesson?
options: The laws of the Jewish people
answer_en: Spiritual perspective and hope
answer_ja: 霊的な視点と希望

question: Who is identified as the man riding the red horse in Zechariah's vision?
options: The angel of the Lord (Jesus Christ)
answer_en: The angel of the Lord (Jesus Christ)
answer_ja: 主の使い（イエス・キリスト）

question: What was the report brought back by the horses in the vision?
options: The whole world is at rest and in peace
answer_en: The whole world is at rest and in peace
answer_ja: 全世界が休息と平和の中にある

question: What was the emotional state of the Jewish exiles when they watched the nightly news according to the lesson?
answer_en: Jealous and angry
answer_ja: 嫉妬と怒り

question: What are the two promises God made to the exiles in Zechariah's vision?
options: Return to Jerusalem with mercy and rebuilding the temple
Victory over enemies and eternal life
Freedom from exile and new laws
answer_en: Return to Jerusalem with mercy and rebuilding the temple
answer_zh: 帶著憐憫回到耶路撒冷並重建聖殿
answer_ja: 憐れみをもってエルサレムに戻り、神殿を再建すること

question: What is the spiritual principle regarding God's enemies as revealed in the vision?
options: God allows enemies to prosper forever
God sees and will bring justice to his enemies
answer_en: God sees and will bring justice to his enemies
answer_zh: 神看顧並將對敵人施行公義
answer_ja: 神は見ており、敵に正義をもたらす

question: According to the lesson, what should be our attitude when watching the nightly news?
options: Watch with hope knowing God is in control
answer_en: Watch with hope knowing God is in control
answer_zh: 帶著希望觀看，知道神掌權
answer_ja: 神が支配していることを知り、希望を持って見る

question: What historical event is the vision of the horsemen set just before?
answer_en: Darius taking the throne
answer_ja: ダリウスが王位につく前

question: Why did the Jewish people stop rebuilding the temple after laying the foundation?
options: Enemies protested and government stopped them
They were taken back into exile
answer_en: Enemies protested and government stopped them
answer_zh: 敵人抗議，政府下令停止
answer_ja: 敵が抗議し、政府が建設を停止させた

question: What is the role of the angel of the Lord in Zechariah's vision?
options: To explain the vision to Zechariah
answer_en: To explain the vision to Zechariah
answer_ja: ゼカリヤに幻を説明すること

question: How many times were the Jewish people carried into Babylonian exile?
answer_en: Three times
answer_ja: 三回

question: What year did Zechariah receive his first night vision?
answer_en: 519 BC
answer_ja: 紀元前519年

question: What colors were the horses mentioned in Zechariah's vision?
answer_en: Red, brown, and white
answer_ja: 赤、茶色、白

question: What was the duration of the Babylonian captivity mentioned in the lesson?
answer_en: 70 years

question: Who was the Persian king that allowed the Jews to return and rebuild the temple?
answer_en: Cyrus
answer_ja: キュロス

question: What was the reaction of the Jewish people to the report that the whole world was at peace?
answer_en: They felt jealousy and anger
answer_ja: 彼らは嫉妬と怒りを感じた

question: What was the purpose of the horses sent by the Lord in the vision?
options: To report on the state of the earth
answer_en: To report on the state of the earth
answer_ja: 地上の状況を報告するため

question: What happened to the Babylonians after Darius took the throne?
options: They were punished and rebellion was stopped
answer_en: They were punished and rebellion was stopped
answer_ja: 罰せられ、反乱が鎮圧された

question: What is the significance of the 70 years mentioned in the vision?
answer_en: Length of the Babylonian captivity
answer_ja: バビロン捕囚の期間

question: What does God promise to do for Jerusalem and Zion in the comforting message?
options: Be jealous and watch over them
answer_en: Be jealous and watch over them
answer_ja: 嫉妬し、見守る

question: What does the phrase 'spiritual perspective' most closely mean in the context of the lesson?
answer_en: Hope and faith in God
answer_ja: 神への希望と信仰

question: In the lesson, what does 'exile' refer to?
options: Being forced to live away from home
answer_en: Being forced to live away from home
answer_ja: 故郷を離れて生活することを強いられること

question: What does the term 'angel of the Lord' imply in biblical context as per the lesson?
options: A divine messenger, often Jesus Christ
answer_en: A divine messenger, often Jesus Christ
answer_zh: 神的使者，常指耶穌基督
answer_ja: 神の使者、しばしばイエス・キリスト

question: What does the phrase 'carry out God's will' mean in the lesson's context?
answer_en: Execute or fulfill God's plan
answer_ja: 神の計画を実行または成就すること

question: What does 'jealous' mean in the phrase 'I am very jealous for Jerusalem'?
answer_en: Protective and zealous love
answer_ja: 保護的で熱心な愛

question: What does 'prosperity' mean as used in the lesson?
answer_en: Wealth and success
answer_ja: 富と成功

question: What does the phrase 'all things work together for good' imply?
options: God uses all events for the benefit of believers
answer_en: God uses all events for the benefit of believers
answer_zh: 神使所有事件為信徒帶來益處
answer_ja: 神はすべての出来事を信者の益のために用いる

question: What does 'forsake' mean in the phrase 'God will never leave or forsake you'?
answer_en: Abandon or desert
answer_ja: 見捨てること

question: What does 'exile' mean in the context of the Jewish people?
options: Being forced to live away from their homeland
answer_en: Being forced to live away from their homeland
answer_ja: 故郷を離れて生活することを強いられること

question: What does the term 'nightly news' symbolize in the lesson?
options: Daily world events that cause despair
answer_en: Daily world events that cause despair
answer_zh: 每日世界事件引起絕望
answer_ja: 毎日の世界の出来事で絶望を引き起こすもの

question: How can understanding the spiritual principles in Zechariah's vision help you when facing bad news in the world?
options: It makes you ignore the news
It helps you maintain hope knowing God is in control
It encourages you to be fearful
It makes you angry at the world
answer_en: It helps you maintain hope knowing God is in control
answer_zh: 幫助你保持希望，知道神掌控一切
answer_ja: 神が支配していることを知り、希望を持ち続けるのに役立つ

question: Why is it important to share hope with people around you according to the lesson?
options: Because many people lack hope and need encouragement
Because it is a religious duty only
answer_en: Because many people lack hope and need encouragement
answer_zh: 因為許多人缺乏希望，需要鼓勵
answer_ja: 多くの人が希望を欠き、励ましを必要としているから

question: How can you guard your hope against the attacks of the devil as suggested in the lesson?
options: By understanding God's control and promises
answer_en: By understanding God's control and promises
answer_zh: 通過理解神的掌控與應許
answer_ja: 神の支配と約束を理解することで

question: What role does faith play when watching the nightly news according to the lesson?
options: Faith helps us see beyond what our eyes show
answer_en: Faith helps us see beyond what our eyes show
answer_zh: 信心幫助我們超越眼見
answer_ja: 信仰は目に見えるものを超えて見る助けとなる

question: How can the story of the Babylonians' punishment encourage believers today?
options: It shows that evil will go unpunished
It assures that God will bring justice in due time
answer_en: It assures that God will bring justice in due time
answer_zh: 確保神會在適當時候施行公義
answer_ja: 神が適切な時に正義をもたらすことを保証する

question: Why might God choose to reveal truths through visions instead of simple words?
options: Because visions can convey deeper spiritual truths effectively
answer_en: Because visions can convey deeper spiritual truths effectively
answer_zh: 因為異象能有效傳達更深的靈性真理
answer_ja: 幻はより深い霊的真理を効果的に伝えることができるから

question: How can believers apply the two spiritual principles revealed in Zechariah's vision in their daily life?
options: By trusting God's control and expecting His blessings
By focusing only on personal success
answer_en: By trusting God's control and expecting His blessings
answer_zh: 信靠神的掌控並期待祂的祝福
answer_ja: 神の支配を信頼し、祝福を期待することによって

question: What is the importance of hope in sharing the gospel according to the lesson?
options: Hope is irrelevant to sharing the gospel
Hope enables believers to encourage others despite challenges
answer_en: Hope enables believers to encourage others despite challenges
answer_zh: 希望使信徒能在挑戰中鼓勵他人
answer_ja: 希望は信者が困難の中で他者を励ますことを可能にする

question: How does knowing God is 'jealous' for His people affect your relationship with Him?
options: It shows God deeply cares and protects His people
It means God is angry all the time
answer_en: It shows God deeply cares and protects His people
answer_zh: 顯示神深切關心並保護祂的子民
answer_ja: 神が深く気遣い、民を守っていることを示す

question: What can believers do to maintain hope when the world seems chaotic and hopeless?
options: Focus on God's control and His plan for good
answer_en: Focus on God's control and His plan for good
answer_zh: 專注於神的掌控及祂為善的計劃
answer_ja: 神の支配と善の計画に集中する
